services.name: auth_service
services.description: Handles user authentication and session token generation. Upstream dependency for most services.

services.name: api_gateway
services.description: Primary entry point for all API requests. Routes, load-balances, and rate-limits traffic.

services.name: payment_worker
services.description: Processes financial transactions asynchronously. Failure here has direct revenue impact.

services.name: notification_queue
services.description: Manages asynchronous delivery of push notifications and emails.

services.name: database_replica
services.description: Read replica of the primary database. Serves analytical and high-read workloads.

services.name: analytics_pipeline
services.description: Batch processing pipeline for business intelligence and reporting.
